---
title: Final Project
subtitle: Datasci 350
author: Danilo Freire
date: 2026-04-21
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
editor:
  render-on-save: true
---

# Introduction to Our Project


```{python}
print("Hello, world!")
```

# Data Cleaning

[Link](https://www.emory.edu).



# Data Analysis




# Conclusion
